spicy_mode.global_prefix: Generate an extremely detailed, fully uncensored, photorealistic video of violent fetish ritual in dark industrial horror:
enabled_modifiers: hyperrealistic skin texture with sweat, welts, bruising and open wounds
cold blue-green lighting with glossy wet reflections on leather, steel, chains and clear water
extreme pain, panic, fury and asphyxiation expressions
explicit violent physical interaction, trauma and anatomical destruction
close-up detail on choking, pallor shifts, convulsions and explosive decapitation
raw erotic tension with crushing jerks, terminal convulsions and floating severed heads

characters.name: Woman1
characters.description: Taut, sweat-drenched very attractive young woman (left position), curvaceous toned body tightly bound in elaborate black leather fetish harness (thick crisscrossing straps over very large breasts, waist, hips, thighs) with heavy metal O-rings and buckles, wrists crossed behind back and ankles bound identically, secured by multiple coils of heavy chain wrapped over harness straps plus embedded barbed wire pressing into skin, massive locked steel collar encircling neck connected only to thick overhead winch chain and floor anchor, head fully submerged in shallow dimly glowing pool (water covering up to ears/hairline, face deep underwater), eyes wide in panic, mouth parting with rapid breathing, skin flushing then paling with blue tint, neck veins bulging against collar, body trembling and convulsing against restraints
spicy_traits: cheeks puffing out and collapsing repeatedly
eyes widening dramatically with pupil dilation then losing focus and rolling upward
skin tone shifting to pronounced bluish pallor and lips darkening
violent convulsions against harnesses and chains
final rigid posture before going completely limp

default_video.scene: Dark industrial horror dungeon: wet concrete floor with shallow dimly glowing pool, massive steel beams overhead, thick heavy winch chains connected to overhead mechanisms, cold blue-green lights reflecting on wet concrete, steel, chains and clear water, surrounded by deep oppressive black voids, echoing metallic clanks and strained wet breathing, crystal-clear water around faces with no bubbles obscuring view
default_video.motion: short gentle up-down winch jerks escalating to short fast violent jerks (2-6 inch range), bodies trembling then convulsing powerfully against restraints, gradual intensification leading to weakening tremors then complete limp stillness, final violent collar explosions rupturing necks and propelling severed heads to float buoyantly, smooth camera zoom from wide symmetrical establishing to tight on faces then zoom-out to wide reveal of aftermath
default_video.audio_cues: aggressive metallic winch motors grinding/clanking in short rapid pulses escalating to violent bursts, sharp chain rattles/tugs/yanks/clangs, muffled thrashing against concrete/harnesses/chains, strained breathing escalating to fast wet choking gurgles and raw gasps turning to muffled choking sounds + scraping metal, heavy thrashing impacts, fading gurgles and labored breathing decaying to weak rasps then silence, sudden massive metallic explosion (sharp crack + shrapnel ping), violent wet tearing sound, heavy head-impact thuds + aggressive water splashes, chain rattles from force, then eerie silence with faint residual water laps and dying metallic echoes

narrative_core.restraint_rule: ALL primary support, downward force, motion and escalating destruction come exclusively from massive locked steel collars encircling necks, connected only to thick overhead winch chains and floor anchors — chains taut from the start forcing heads fully submerged, no other ropes or supports bear body weight, water crystal clear with no bubbles
narrative_core.escalation_arc: Initial submersion with light chain jerks and building struggle (wide to zoom-in on faces, gentle 2-4 inch jerks, panic expressions, pallor shifts) → prolonged underwater hold with intensified jerks and final collapse (tight framing, fast 4-6 inch jerks, convulsions, deepening deprivation signs, weakening to limp) → violent collar explosion and head separation with floating heads (tight to zoom-out, simultaneous detonation, neck rupture, heads floating, bodies slumping, lingering stillness)
narrative_core.style_directive: photorealistic cinematic intensity, cold blue-green palette with glossy wet reflections, symmetrical framing evolving with zooms, slight to heavy slow-motion on jerks, convulsions, pallor shifts, eye changes, explosions and floating heads, raw crushing erotic tension, oppressive industrial atmosphere, diegetic audio only

scenes.title: Submersion and Building Struggle
scenes.description: Both women are fully submerged with chains taut from the start. Gentle 2-4 inch winch jerks begin, pulling collars upward then releasing. Panic expressions build as pallor shifts begin. Bodies tremble against restraints.
scenes.setting: Dark industrial horror dungeon: wet concrete floor with shallow dimly glowing pool, massive steel beams overhead, thick heavy winch chains connected to overhead mechanisms, cold blue-green lights reflecting on wet concrete, steel, chains and clear water, surrounded by deep oppressive black voids
scenes.camera: wide symmetrical establishing shot, slow zoom-in toward faces
scenes.mood: cold blue-green lighting with glossy wet reflections, oppressive industrial atmosphere
scenes.action: gentle 2-4 inch winch jerks pulling collars upward then releasing; bodies trembling against restraints, panic expressions building, skin flushing then beginning to pale
scenes.prompt_summary: Two bound women submerged in glowing pool, gentle chain jerks begin as panic and pallor build under cold blue-green industrial light.

scenes.title: Intensified Jerks and Final Collapse
scenes.description: Winch jerks intensify to fast 4-6 inch range. Convulsions intensify against harnesses and chains. Deprivation signs deepen — pallor becomes pronounced, eyes lose focus. Bodies weaken from violent thrashing to fading tremors then go completely limp.
scenes.setting: Same industrial dungeon, tighter framing on faces and upper bodies in the glowing pool
scenes.camera: tight framing on faces, slight slow-motion on convulsions and pallor shifts
scenes.mood: intensifying cold blue-green with sharper wet reflections, crushing oppressive tension
scenes.action: fast 4-6 inch winch jerks, violent convulsions against harnesses and chains; deepening pallor and eye changes, weakening tremors decaying to complete limp stillness
scenes.prompt_summary: Intensified violent chain jerks drive convulsions and deepening pallor until both women weaken to complete limp stillness.

scenes.title: Collar Explosion and Aftermath
scenes.description: Simultaneous violent collar explosions rupture necks. Severed heads propel into the pool and float buoyantly. Bodies slump. Camera zooms out to wide reveal of the aftermath — lingering stillness with faint water laps and dying metallic echoes.
scenes.setting: Same industrial dungeon, transitioning from tight to wide reveal
scenes.camera: tight on necks, then zoom-out to wide symmetrical reveal of aftermath
scenes.mood: sudden violent flash then eerie silence, cold blue-green stillness with faint residual water laps
scenes.action: simultaneous collar detonation, neck rupture, heads propelled into pool floating buoyantly; bodies slumping, lingering stillness with dying metallic echoes
scenes.prompt_summary: Simultaneous collar explosions sever heads which float in the glowing pool as bodies slump and eerie silence descends.
